lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Ishmael
lines.text: The name's Ishmael. I sell fishing supplies, along with some of the local catch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a look at what you have in stock?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you set up shop around here? It seems a little run down.

lines.speaker: Ishmael
lines.text: Argh... run down it is! But since Tempoross showed up, seadogs from all across Gielinor have been coming to wrangle the beast. It only made sense to sell off our spare resources.
